---
title: "\'Cawnpore\'"
---

## \'Cawnpore\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1865
**Genre:** Non-Fiction: criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** Not reprinted in volume form

### Notes

This was a review of <i>Cawnpore</i> by George Otto Trevelyan. The author was not named.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
